EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for general Direct leads at the second attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Direct Lead (General)_2nd Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Insurance quote follow up
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’ve not been able to reach you to provide you with a quote for your business insurance.
It would be useful to know more about your business, so I can understand what cover you might require.
Some key benefits of buying from Kingsbridge are:
- Packaged products from industry-leading A-rated insurers – We offer a range of products that are tailored to specific sectors and job roles. - Flexible payment options – We offer multiple ways to pay for your policy, including monthly payment options. - Competitively priced cover - We make sure our prices remain competitive for all our customers, whether they’re new to us or not. - Outstanding customer service - Our experienced customer service team are here to help you with cover that suits your needs. But don’t just take it from us, why not take a look at our 10,000+ Feefo reviews, with an average customer satisfaction score of 4.8/5 - https://www.feefo.com/en-GB/reviews/kingsbridge-contractor-insurance?displayFeedbackType=SERVICE&timeFrame=YEAR
However, it would be good to discuss your requirements to make sure this is the best policy for you. Is there a good time for me to give you a call?
Alternatively, you can contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
You can also get a quote online via our website www.kingsbridge.co.uk.
I look forward to hearing from you soon.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
